name: attributesearch
description: Verify that the attribute search is working and the result is loading.
descriptionHtml: Verify that the attribute search is working and the result is loading.

testStage.description: Verify that the attribute search is working and the result is loading.

steps.name: Double-clicked on first search result and opened viewer
